pr.title: feat: consolidate rescued code from 12 deleted repos + strip non-code (AMP-365)
pr.body:
## Linear ticket

AMP-365

## What changed

Two-phase reorganisation of GitHub to its final shape. 35 repos were deleted tonight. Before they went, all valuable code was rescued and merged into `02_build/`. Then all non-code (853 governance docs, session logs, vault-monitor runs, archive files) was stripped out.

**Phase 1 — Merge rescued code (13 new directories in `02_build/`):**

| Directory | Source repo | Files | What it is |
|-----------|------------|-------|------------|
| `crm/` | crm | 220 py + 49 ts | Full CRM — Business Brain, Interview Engine, Intelligence suite, MCP servers |
| `amplified_machine/` | amplified-machine | 97 py | LangGraph multi-agent orchestration engine |
| `amplified_site/` | amplified-site | 73 ts + 2 py | AOS full-stack web app (Express + React) |
| `vellum/` | vellum (standalone) | 55 py | Full version — replaces partial copy. Adds auth, signing, export, postgres storage |
| `pudding_core/` | pudding-core | 25 py | Four Russian Stack mathematical retrieval + full test suite |
| `byker/` | byker-production | 23 py | KiloRouter fleet orchestration, Cover AI diagnostics |
| `marketing_engine/` | marketing-engine | 14 py | Autonomous content pipeline with Kaizen loops |
| `ghost_sidecar/` | beautiful-and-golden | 12 py | Read-only legacy system observer |
| `visual_polish/` | visual-polish-systemdot | 12 ts/js | Kaizen loop UI regression, Playwright, Style Dictionary |
| `mission_control/` | mission-control | 19 ts | Next.js orchestration dashboard |
| `token_proxy/` | anthropic-token-proxy | 3 py | Cost proxy with semantic caching |
| `layer0/` + `temporal/` | devon-memory | 7 py | Epistemic Layer 0 + Temporal workflows |
| `amplified_website/` | amplified-website | 3 ts | Next.js landing page |

**Phase 2 — Strip non-code (853 files removed):**
- `00_authority/` (22 governance .md) — moved to Linear docs + Devin knowledge
- `01_truth/` (248 files — processes, schemas, data) — moved to Linear + external storage
- `03_shadow/` (123 files — session logs, scratch) — moved to Linear / discarded
- `90_archive/` (437 files — vault-monitor runs, legacy) — cold storage
- Root strategic .md files (11) — moved to Linear
- `agent-comms/`, `docs/` (4 files) — moved to Linear
- `02_build/security/*.md` + `.pdf` (11 spec docs) — moved to Linear

**Result:** 1,259 files (712 Python, 177 TypeScript/JS, 104 markdown READMEs). Zero governance docs. Zero session logs. All code, one place.

**`.gitignore` updated:** Removed sibling-repo exclusion patterns (`crm/`, `amplified-site/`, etc.) that were blocking `02_build/` subdirectories.

## Mode (per AGENTS.md)

- [x] Surface — significant / irreversible, with `DECISION_LOG.md` pointer below

## Pre-merge checklist

- [x] Signatures present on every committed artefact (`00_authority/SIGNATURES.md`)
- [x] If `00_authority/*` touched: version bumped + changelog entry added — N/A (files removed, not edited)
- [ ] If new authoritative rule or irreversible commit: `00_authority/DECISION_LOG.md` pointer added — 00_authority removed in this PR
- [x] Every file reference points to a thing that exists (or is marked `[SOURCE REQUIRED]`)
- [x] Examples do not contradict their own rule
- [ ] New indexable files (`00_authority/*`, `01_truth/processes/*`, etc.) appear in `00_authority/MANIFEST.md` — MANIFEST removed in this PR

## Surface link (only if Mode = Surface)

`00_authority/DECISION_LOG.md` was removed as part of Phase 2. Decision documented in commit message, this PR description, and Linear AMP-365. All authority docs are preserved in Devin knowledge notes and the original repos remain cloned on the Devin VM.

## Notes to reviewer

1. **This is the big one.** Ewan requested tonight that GitHub be cleaned to its final shape — code only. 35 repos were deleted from the org. All valuable code was rescued before deletion and merged here.
2. **Mission Control included but noted as Ewan's** — he said "Mission Control is actually mine." It's in `02_build/mission_control/` for now. Can be extracted to its own repo if preferred.
3. **Vellum was upgraded** — the clean-build copy had 33 py files. The standalone repo had 55 py files (22 more: auth middleware, signing keys, postgres storage, export pipeline, tenant management, YJS bridge). The full version replaces the partial copy.
4. **Import paths not yet updated** — each merged codebase retains its original import structure. A follow-up PR will harmonise imports for the monorepo context.
5. **All 40 original repos remain cloned on the Devin VM at `/home/ubuntu/repos/`** as a safety net.

Devon | 2026-05-21 | session devin-0ae8796f3a694e1db79d8e68ca927e72

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/0ae8796f3a694e1db79d8e68ca927e72
Requested by: @ewan-dot
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
